pr.title: Non-record: Full GPTQ + XSA-4 + Score-First TTT (3-seed mean 1.1198)

output.summary: Combines Hessian-aware GPTQ, cross-sequence attention on late layers, and SWA/EMA blending before score-first TTT adaptation.
techniques: Hessian-aware int6 GPTQ with Cholesky compensation and percentile clipping
XSA on the last four layers for extended context during eval
Score-first TTT with frozen early blocks plus 50/50 EMA and tight SWA blend
